description_long: This chaise features a robust wooden construction with a natural wood grain finish, giving it a warm and inviting appearance. The backrest is moderately high, flat, and rectangular, with a subtle horizontal groove detail, while the side panels are gently curved for added comfort and style. The seat is wide and flat, designed to accommodate one or more people, and the front panel appears to have two subtle drawer outlines, suggesting possible storage functionality. The wood grain pattern is consistent throughout, with visible knots and variations that enhance its rustic charm. The legs are short and integrated into the frame, providing stability without drawing attention. Overall, the design is minimalist yet functional, suitable for parks, public spaces, or urban relaxation areas.
description: A wide, wooden chaise with a natural grain finish, curved side panels, and a flat, rectangular backrest. The design is minimalist and functional, with subtle storage features and a rustic appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide seat, curved side panels, flat backrest, and subtle drawer outlines on the lower front panel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the gentle curve of the side panel and the thickness of the wooden structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wood back and the continuous grain pattern, with the backrest extending above the main frame.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the curved side panel and the seamless wood finish.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is a flat, rectangular wooden panel with a moderate height and a subtle horizontal groove detail, providing a simple yet functional support. It is unsegmented and lacks decorative elements such as tufting or cutouts.
attribute_armrest_presence: The chaise has armrests on both sides, formed by the gently curved extensions of the side panels.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, block-like, and integrated into the main frame, constructed from the same wood material and finished with a consistent grain pattern. They are functional and unobtrusive, without decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: There is no visible upholstery; the surface is solid wood with a natural grain pattern and visible knots, giving it a rustic, unembellished appearance.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: No cushions are present; the seat and backrest are formed entirely from solid wood panels, with no attached or loose cushions visible.
